case_title: ANDERSON-LANG PROPERTY, L.P. VS. SUNTILE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANDERSON-LANG PROPERTY, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SUNTILE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON-LANG PROPERTY, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SUNTILE, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON-LANG PROPERTY, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SUNTILE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-29-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUNTILE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON-LANG PROPERTY, L.P.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNTILE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-30-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,000.00 PER MONTH BEGINING ON MAY 15, 2012 AND CONTINUING EACH MONTH ON THE 15TH FOR 11 MONTHS. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE A PAYMENT, THE PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST A JUDGMENT UP TO $5,000. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO ANDERSON-LANG PROPERTY -RETURNED/INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES PER PROGRESS REPORT OF MAY 02, 2012.NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER FOR DISMISSAL,SENT TO PLAINTIFF
